title: スプリングSの後に・スピード勝ち

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite having difficulties with the distance, she
secures victory. Sakura Bakushin O has newfound
confidence to try for the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, believing her speed would better shine
at the Aoi Stakes, I manage to talk her down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emotional at hearing me long for even greater
speed, Sakura Bakushin O is firm in making the
Aoi Stakes her next goal.
